description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ros:kinetic-perception Docker image with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs before_script apt-get update, apt-get install -y git build-essential cmake qt5-default libopencv-dev libyaml-cpp-dev, git submodule update --init, mkdir build, cd build; then script runs cmake .. and make -j4, uploads the entire repository as an artifact, is excluded from tag pipelines, and runs on docker runners. In the test stage add a test job that runs before_script apt-get update and apt-get install -y cmake libopencv-dev libyaml-cpp-dev, then script cd build and ctest -VV, is also excluded from tag pipelines, and runs on docker runners.
